report_metadata.title: DGAC Investigation Analysis - LATAM Passenger Removal Incident
report_metadata.location: Arturo Merino Benítez International Airport, Santiago, Chile
report_metadata.investigating_authority: DGAC (Dirección General de Aeronáutica Civil de Chile)

key_findings: Presumption of innocence violated in investigation procedures
Evidence collected after punitive action taken
Passenger denied right to confront accuser
Cultural and language barriers not addressed

investigation_violations.description: Punitive action taken before investigation, violating presumption of innocence
investigation_violations.evidence: Passenger removed, investigation conducted after the fact
evidence_quotes: para llegar a ese punto debieron probar que yo hubiese hecho algo primero
investigation_violations.procedural_error: Action → Investigation sequence instead of Investigation → Action
investigation_violations.legal_principle: In dubio pro reo - doubt should benefit the accused

investigation_violations.description: Passenger prevented from questioning accuser during investigation
investigation_violations.evidence: Passenger denied opportunity to confront accusing witness
evidence_quotes: No, no puede. como es testigo uno no puede hablar con las personas que..
investigation_violations.procedural_error: Denial of fundamental fair hearing right
investigation_violations.legal_principle: Right to confront witnesses against you

investigation_violations.description: Evidence collection occurs after punitive action has been taken
investigation_violations.evidence: Camera review and evidence collection mentioned after removal
evidence_quotes: policía le dijo que iba a ver las cámaras, iba a ver su caso
investigation_violations.procedural_error: Evidence review after decision, not before
investigation_violations.recommendation: Require evidence review before any removal action

investigation_violations.description: Lack of clear explanation of investigation rights and procedures
investigation_violations.evidence: Passenger confusion about procedures despite DGAC explanations
evidence_quotes: llegamos a todo esto que está pasando sin confirmar la verdad
investigation_violations.procedural_error: Inadequate communication of rights and procedures
investigation_violations.legal_principle: Right to understand proceedings against you

investigation_violations.description: No preventive measures against false crew allegations in procedures
investigation_violations.evidence: Discussion of false accusation consequences but no preventive measures
evidence_quotes: si fuera una falsa acusación, se va a tomar la medida que corresponda
investigation_violations.procedural_error: Addresses consequences, not prevention of false allegations
investigation_violations.legal_principle: Systems should prevent harm, not just remedy it

current_procedure: Captain orders removal based on allegation
legal_deficiencies: No preventive measures against false accusations

legal_action_risks.description: To ICAO or human rights bodies
Actions in both Chile and Brazil

immediate: Suspend current investigation pending procedural review
Provide passenger with written rights statement in Portuguese
Appoint independent investigator not involved in initial incident
Review all camera footage before any further proceedings
urgent: Revise DGAC investigation procedures to ensure due process
Implement presumption of innocence in all passenger cases
Create multilingual rights documentation for international passengers
systemic: Train DGAC investigators on international human rights standards
Develop evidence-first protocols for passenger incidents
Establish cultural competence training for investigators
Create passenger advocate role within DGAC

warning_flags: Reactive investigation rather than proactive prevention
Procedure prioritized over justice and fairness
Limited passenger participation in own defense
Cultural insensitivity to international passenger context
